message.content:
Explore /root/jake_desktop and give me a detailed map of:

1. List all files (not inside venv/.venv)
2. Read app.py in blocks of 100 lines at a time, identifying:
   - All Flask routes (especially: architect, rotinas/agenda, prompts/gerador, financeiro, carrossel, copys, relatorios)
   - Which route handles the financial data (integration with Google Sheets / tabela raio x)
   - The "Projeto 1 Milhão" feature
   - Any route for "rotinas", "agenda", "prompts"
3. Read dashboard.html in blocks of 100 lines, identifying:
   - The navigation menu items and their IDs
   - The page divs (id="page-*")
   - The financeiro page structure (sections: lançamentos, projeções, projeto 1 milhão, visão geral)
   - The architect page section
   - Any rotinas/agenda page section
   - The prompts page section
4. Check static/js/ for: financeiro.js, prompts.js, architect.js - list what each does
5. Check if there's any Google Sheets / planilha integration in the financial module

Do NOT read any file entirely at once - use line ranges of max 100 lines. Focus on understanding the structure.

Return a complete map with:
- File list
- Route list from app.py with line numbers
- Page sections in dashboard.html with line numbers
- Summary of financeiro.js structure
- How the spreadsheet integration works (or doesn't)

content.text: I'll systematically explore the jake_desktop directory to map out the structure, routes, and key features. Let me start with a file listing.
